log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
